archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) with Editorial Old Money Tech Variant
design_philosophy: A premium, editorial mobile web experience for horse racing enthusiasts. Blends the authoritative, data-dense layout of a traditional racing journal (Le Journal Hippique) with modern, mobile-first Swiss design principles. High legibility, deep contrast, and tactile surfaces.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none text-[#1A1A1A]

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mobile-first standard flow. Use grid-cols-1. For stats, use grid-cols-2 or grid-cols-4 with gap-4.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Not required globally, but use 'Control Room' tight grids for the classifications and stats tables.

cards.style: The 'Technical' Look mixed with Editorial. Flat background (bg-white), 1px crisp border (border-[#E5E3D8]), no shadows. Use border-collapse for list views.
cards.hover: Slight bg-color shift to #F3F2ED, no lifting animations to maintain print journal feel.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A2E1A] text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#072112] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#B08D57] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A2E1A] text-[#0A2E1A] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#F3F2ED] transition-colors

navigation.bottom_tab: Fixed bottom inset-x-0 bg-white border-t border-[#E5E3D8] pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#FAF9F6]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E5E3D8] py-4 px-4 flex justify-between items-center

pills_and_tags.form_string: bg-[#F3F2ED] text-[#1A1A1A] text-xs font-mono px-2 py-1 rounded-sm border border-[#E5E3D8]
pills_and_tags.horse_number: bg-[#0A2E1A] text-white text-sm font-bold w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full

tables.style: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Visible borders for data density, mimicking a printed racing form. border-collapse, border-b border-[#E5E3D8] for rows.

motion.hover_states: Subtle background color shifts. Minimal movement. Maintain authoritative, stable feel.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a refined, elegant look. Do not mix icon families.

hero_race.description: Jockeys and horses bursting from the starting gate. Use in the top hero section with a bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text readability.

secondary_race.description: Dynamic view of a thrilling horse race. Can be used for article banners or previous results headers.

media.guidelines: Hero images must have maximum height constraints (max-h-[40vh] on mobile) to not overwhelm the UI. Use a gradient overlay if placing text on top.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against colored backgrounds meets WCAG AA standard (4.5:1).
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

specific_screens.race_overview: Hero image with large Playfair Display heading 'Prix du Pavillon Royal'. Display track, distance (2400m), runners (16), and prize money in F CFA prominently below the title.
specific_screens.horse_list: List format with right/left borders removed, bottom borders separating items. Horse number prominent. Include Jockey, Trainer, and Weight.
specific_screens.horse_detail_view: Can be a separate view or a Shadcn Drawer sliding up. Must contain deep stats, earnings in F CFA, and recent performance string.
specific_screens.expert_predictions: A grid or dense list showing media outlets and their consensus rankings. Use small text for outlet names, large bold text for their top picked horse numbers.
specific_screens.classifications_tab: Tabs for Forme, Classe, Progrès, Régularité. Use Shadcn Tabs component but override styles to use a crisp underline instead of generic pill backgrounds.
specific_screens.previous_results: Data table showing Ordre, Désordre, Bonus, Couplé payouts formatted in F CFA.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Tailwind with the specified colors and fonts.
Do not use generic Shadcn Cards; implement custom flat, bordered containers as defined in cards style.
Implement bottom tab navigation for mobile UX (Home, Horses, Predictions, Results).
Format all currency as 'F CFA' and use French locale formatting for large numbers (e.g., 33 500 000 F CFA).
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all actionable items.
Maintain the 'Old Money Tech' editorial aesthetic—it should look like a digital, interactive version of a premium printed horse racing newspaper.
